Thanks for contributing!

Please fill out the sections below so reviewers can verify the change.
-->

## What changed
<!--
1–2 sentences.

For a data fix:
  "Updated the elections office phone for California from X to Y."

For a new division:
  "Adds data/tn/state.yml — the Tennessee state record."
-->

## Where I got this information
<!--
URL(s) supporting the change. If you added `sources:` entries to the
YAML file, paste the same URLs here so reviewers don't have to dig them
out of the diff.
-->

## Type of change
- [ ] Fix / update to an existing field (typo, phone number, URL, etc.)
- [ ] New data added to an existing division
- [ ] New division file
- [ ] Schema, tooling, or docs change
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Checklist
- [ ] `divisions lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest` passes (if code changed)
- [ ] Added or updated a `sources:` entry when adding new facts
- [ ] Minimal edits — did not reorder fields or reflow YAML unnecessarily
